channel.title: Arts on Jackie Loven
channel.description: Recent content in Arts on Jackie Loven

item.title: Acrylic on canvas
item.description: Wineglasses and fruit, 2020, all for sale Through my window, 2020, 48"x48” Wineglasses, 2020, for sale Signed album covers (Bahamas, Electric Guest, Magic City Hippies, The Palms, Bay Ledges), 2018-2020 Sleeping cat card, 2019 Bep, 2020. http://bep.world Abstract shapes, 2020

item.title: Glassblowing
item.description: Pitcher and vases, 2019 Me finishing up a pitcher, 2018 Organic shapes and small vase, 2020 Pitcher made from scraps of glass found around the studio, 2019 Tiny pitcher, 2019

item.title: Torchwork
item.description: “Rio”, a commission of a family dog ornament for a friend, 2019 “See no evil, hear no evil, speak no evil” monkeys, 2019 Turtle with lens back, 2019 Small friends, including Bep, 2020.
